## Selected Publications

### Journal Articles

**Walker, Robert W.**, and Tim Johnson. 2018. "The Career Advancement of Military Veterans in Recent Cohorts of the U.S. Executive Branch." *Public Personnel Management* 47(4): 367-394.

::: {.callout-note}
## Abstract
To measure the effect of veterans' preference on U.S. federal workforce quality, researchers have assessed whether military veterans advance in their federal careers at a different rate than nonveterans. This research, however, has produced mixed results.
:::

[PDF](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/pdf/10.1177/0091026018783015) | [Supplementary Materials](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/suppl/10.1177/0091026018783015)

---

Rizova, Polly S., Elliot N. Maltz, Samir Gupta, and **Robert W. Walker**. 2018. "Overcoming equivocality on projects in the fuzzy front end: Bringing social networks back in." *Technovation* 78: 1-11.

::: {.callout-note}
## Abstract
The management of the fuzzy front end (FFE) phase of innovation is crucial to the ultimate success of new product and process initiatives. A critical challenge that teams face at this stage is dealing with equivocality.
:::

[PDF](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.technovation.2018.05.006)

---

**Walker, Robert W.** 2016. "On Generalizing Ordered Cumulative Regression Models." *Journal of Modern Applied Statistical Methods* 15(2): 738-787.

::: {.callout-important}
## Award
Warren Miller Prize for best article in *Political Analysis*
